title: Odd String Difference
titleCn: 差值数组不同的字符串

testcases.input: words = ["adc","wzy","abc"] Output: "abc" Explanation: - The difference integer array of "adc" is [3 - 0, 2 - 3] = [3, -1]. - The difference integer array of "wzy" is [25 - 22, 24 - 25]= [3, -1]. - The difference integer array of "abc" is [1 - 0, 2 - 1] = [1, 1]. The odd array out is [1, 1], so we return the corresponding string, "abc".
testcases.expectedOutput: "abc" Explanation: - The difference integer array of "adc" is [3 - 0, 2 - 3] = [3, -1]. - The difference integer array of "wzy" is [25 - 22, 24 - 25]= [3, -1]. - The difference integer array of "abc" is [1 - 0, 2 - 1] = [1, 1]. The odd array out is [1, 1], so we return the corresponding string, "abc".

testcases.input: words = ["aaa","bob","ccc","ddd"] Output: "bob" Explanation: All the integer arrays are [0, 0] except for "bob", which corresponds to [13, -13].
testcases.expectedOutput: "bob" Explanation: All the integer arrays are [0, 0] except for "bob", which corresponds to [13, -13].
